110.reason: [Error: The loop should go up to i <= id to include the last element c[id] in the merging process, otherwise the last term is missed.]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: The loop should go up to i <= id to include the last element c[id] in the merging process, otherwise the last term is missed.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Error: The loop should go up to i <= id to include the last element c[id] in the merging process, otherwise the last term may be missed.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 1.0 , reason:  循环边界错误，应改为 i<=id，否则漏掉最后一个乘积项
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.2 , reason:  Loop condition i<id skips the last element c[id], resulting in missing terms in the final result. Should be i<=id.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Logical error: id is the index of the last element in array c, so the loop condition should be i<=id to include the last term during the merging process]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Loop condition should be `i <= id` to include the last element at index `id`; currently skips the last term, causing incorrect output.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Loop condition should be `i <= id` to include the last element at index `id`. This causes missing the last term during combination of like terms.]
